en_title: Developer of Steam Hit Life Sim Paralives Explains How It Can Manage Without Selling Paid DLC
cn_title: Steam人气模拟游戏Paralives如何不靠付费DLC生存

paragraphs.en: "it's what we would like as life sim fans ourselves."
paragraphs.cn: 「这是我们作为生活模拟游戏玩家自己也希望看到的。」

paragraphs.en: The development team behind The Sims-like Paralives has answered various community questions in a Reddit Ask Me Anything (AMA), revealing more about its priority fixes, expanding the team, and why there will never be paid DLC.
paragraphs.cn: 对标《模拟人生》的平行人生开发团队近日在Reddit AMA(随便问)中回答了社区的各种问题,详细谈到了优先修复方向、团队扩张计划,以及为何永远不推出付费DLC。

paragraphs.en: Paralives released on May 25 as an early access title on Steam, and has seen an impressive response. concurrent player numbers peaked at 78,603, and it has over 5,200+ user reviews already, with 88% positive.
paragraphs.cn: 平行人生于5月25日在Steam以抢先体验形式发售,反响相当亮眼:同时在线人数峰值达到78,603人,目前已累计超过5,200条用户评测,好评率88%。

paragraphs.en: To celebrate the release, lead developer and founder, Alex Massé, sat down with the rest of the development team to answer questions. A few people asked about autonomy, suggesting it should be a priority "considering it's a life simulation game and the Paras just stand there doing nothing when not being talked to / interacted with." Massé agreed: "Autonomy is definitely a big core feature of the game that needs more love, more balancing, and especially more content. Adding more autonomous actions and more interactions in general during early access will help."
paragraphs.cn: 为庆祝发售,工作室创始人兼主开发者亚历克斯·马塞(Alex Massé)与团队其他成员一起回答了玩家提问。有玩家关心角色「自主行为」问题,提出「既然这是一款生活模拟游戏,但Para角色在没人和他们互动时只会站着发呆——这件事应该被优先解决」。马塞认同这一观点,回应道:「自主行为绝对是游戏一个非常核心的功能,需要更多打磨、更多平衡,尤其是更多内容。抢先体验阶段我们会增加更多自主行为和互动选项,角色会做的事情会更丰富。」

paragraphs.en: The team also directly responded to a question about adult content being modded into the game. Asked what the team's stance was, QA Charlotte replied: "so long as it follows Steam's guidelines on user-uploaded content and is properly tagged as adult content, it is OK! We also only moderate mods inside of the Steam Workshop, so anything out of there will be out of our jurisdiction."
paragraphs.cn: 团队也直接回答了关于「成人内容MOD」的问题。当被问及团队立场时,QA夏洛特(Charlotte)表示:「只要遵守Steam对用户上传内容的相关规则、并正确标记为成人内容,就没问题!我们仅对Steam创意工坊内的MOD进行管理,工坊外的任何内容都不在我们的管辖范围内。」

paragraphs.en: But it's the commitment to no paid DLC that has a lot of fans excited. Unsurprisingly, they had a lot of questions, too.
paragraphs.cn: 但真正让大批玩家兴奋的,是团队承诺永不推出付费DLC。意料之中,玩家也对此提出了很多问题。

paragraphs.en: "You said 'Paralives will never have paid DLCs,' and that's beyond amazing, but how do you intend to keep development active? It's a risk, I believe," said one fan. "Do you plan to offer merchandise, partnerships, or any paid content?"
paragraphs.cn: 「你们说『平行人生永远不会有付费DLC』,这真的非常棒——但你们打算怎么持续维持开发?在我看来这是个风险,」一位玩家说,「会推出周边商品、合作内容或任何形式的付费内容吗?」

paragraphs.en: "There will never be paid DLCs, only free updates!" said Massé. "Even after the Early Access. As life sim fans, we wanted to make a game we would like to play ourselves without the need to purchase a lot of extra content. Because the team is small (only 15 people) the sales we made so far will sustain us for many years."
paragraphs.cn: 「永远不会有付费DLC,只有免费更新!」马塞回复道,「抢先体验结束后也是如此。作为生活模拟游戏的玩家,我们想做一款自己也愿意玩、不用为额外内容反复花钱的游戏。我们的团队规模很小(只有15人),目前的销量已经足够维持团队多年的开发——即便扩招我们也没问题,所以非常感激玩家的支持。」

paragraphs.en: "I was going to ask this as well," replied one Redditor. "It's a great gesture that's very appreciated but I don't see how it's feasible long-term. Sales will slow eventually and the scope of indefinitely supporting a game that costs as much as a single Sims expansion seems huge."
paragraphs.cn: 「我也想问这个,」另一位Reddit用户回复,「这种姿态非常打动人,但我看不出这怎么能长期持续——销量总会放缓,而长期维护一款卖得跟一个《模拟人生》资料片同价的游戏,工作量看起来太巨大了。」

paragraphs.en: When others questioned this further, Massé added: "The sales we made from the game so far will sustain our small team of 15 for many years so we are happy to be able to offer free-only updates in the future because it's what we would like as life sim fans ourselves."
paragraphs.cn: 当更多玩家进一步质疑时,马塞补充道:「目前的销量足够养活我们15人的小团队多年,所以我们很高兴能在未来只提供免费更新——这是我们作为生活模拟游戏玩家自己也希望看到的。」

paragraphs.en: As for if the team could be expanded beyond 15 people to accommodate the growing wishlist? Massé said: "We would like to expand the team a bit without becoming too big because we like working as a small team! In any case, we will be working on fixing bugs and improving the live mode gameplay in the coming months and the following major updates!"
paragraphs.cn: 至于团队是否会扩张到15人以上以应对玩家不断增长的期待清单,马塞表示:「我们希望适度扩张但不会变得太大,因为我们喜欢小团队工作的方式!不管怎样,接下来几个月以及后续的几个大版本更新中,我们会重点修复Bug、改进生活模式玩法!」

paragraphs.en: What we won't be getting any time soon is multitasking. Though the team answered the question about when Paras will be able to "eat while watching TV sat down," programmer Anna Thibert said: "That's not planned for now since it is quite challenging technically, but we are keeping it as a potential option for a future update!" The OP noted their disappointment.
paragraphs.cn: 短期内不会加入的功能是「多任务」。当被问到Para角色何时能「坐着边看电视边吃饭」时,程序员安娜·蒂贝尔(Anna Thibert)回答:「目前没有计划,因为技术挑战较大,但我们仍会作为未来更新的潜在选项保留。」提问的玩家表示有点失望——「真没想到这居然不在计划内!对我来说,多任务对生活模拟游戏来说几乎是必需功能。」

paragraphs.en: Programmer Jérémie Tessier also commented on feedback that the Together Cards "got very repetitive fast [...] and got in the way of choosing some basic socialization options." "At the moment we do not plan to have a parallel system to Together Cards, you currently can do certain interactions from the menu after you have performed them via Together Cards. We certainly need more cards, just in general and for specific contexts."
paragraphs.cn: 程序员热雷米·泰西耶(Jérémie Tessier)也回应了有关「同伴卡牌」(Together Cards)系统的反馈——有玩家觉得「卡牌很快就重复了,而且挡住了一些基础社交选项的选择」。他表示:「目前我们不打算为『同伴卡牌』系统另起炉灶,玩家可以在通过卡牌触发某些互动后,在菜单里直接重复使用这些互动。我们确实需要更多卡牌,无论是泛用的还是针对特定情境的,也需要更多方式让Para角色『进入』某种情绪状态,这样玩家就能抽到更多想要类型的卡牌。但我们整体对『同伴卡牌』系统是满意的,谢谢!」

paragraphs.en: Masse also added an astonishingly complex but very real example of why designing life sim games is so complex.
paragraphs.cn: 马塞还分享了一个堪称令人咋舌的复杂示例,来说明为什么生活模拟游戏的设计如此困难。

paragraphs.en: We thought Paralives was 'Good,' writing in IGN's review: "Paralives is a rough-around-the-edges life simulator that makes up for its Early Access sins with a striking art style and some promising ideas." The review returned a 7.
paragraphs.cn: IGN在评测中给平行人生打出了「不错」的评价(7分),并写道:「平行人生是一款打磨不够精细的生活模拟器,但它用鲜明的美术风格和一些充满潜力的设计弥补了抢先体验阶段的不足。」

opus_summary: 《模拟人生》对手Paralives开发组在Reddit AMA中承诺「永远不推出付费DLC,只做免费更新」,理由是团队仅15人、目前的Steam销量足够维持多年开发。游戏5月25日抢先体验上线,峰值在线人数78,603,好评率88%。
